change_requests.title: Enhanced Product Search with Voice Recognition
change_requests.description: Implement voice search functionality that allows users to search for products using voice commands. The system should convert speech to text and then perform the search operation using existing search algorithms.
change_requests.business_justification: Improve user experience and accessibility, especially for mobile users. Expected to increase search usage by 25%.
acceptance_criteria: Users can activate voice search from search bar
Voice input is accurately converted to text
Search results match voice query intent
Voice search works on mobile and desktop
Fallback to text search if voice fails

change_requests.title: Shopping Cart Discount Code Integration
change_requests.description: Integrate discount code functionality directly into the shopping cart where users can apply promotional codes, view discount calculations, and see updated totals in real-time.
change_requests.business_justification: Increase conversion rates by making discount application more intuitive. Expected to reduce cart abandonment by 15%.
acceptance_criteria: Discount code input field visible in cart
Real-time validation of discount codes
Automatic calculation of discounts
Clear display of original and discounted prices
Integration with existing checkout flow

change_requests.title: Category Navigation Performance Optimization
change_requests.description: Optimize the category browsing system to improve page load times and implement lazy loading for product images. Add breadcrumb navigation and improve filtering performance.
change_requests.business_justification: Improve user experience and reduce bounce rates. Target 40% improvement in page load times for category pages.
acceptance_criteria: Category pages load within 2 seconds
Breadcrumb navigation shows current location
Images load progressively as user scrolls
Filtering maintains good performance
Navigation maintains current functionality

change_requests.title: Payment Gateway Security Update
change_requests.description: Update payment processing to support new PCI DSS compliance requirements and integrate additional fraud detection mechanisms. Implement 3D Secure authentication for credit card transactions.
change_requests.business_justification: Mandatory compliance requirement. Failure to implement will result in inability to process credit card payments.
acceptance_criteria: All payment processing meets PCI DSS 4.0 requirements
3D Secure authentication for eligible cards
Enhanced fraud detection without impacting user experience
Secure handling of payment credentials
Backward compatibility with existing orders

change_requests.title: Mobile App Cart Synchronization Bug Fix
change_requests.description: Fix critical bug where shopping cart items are not synchronizing correctly between mobile app and web platform, causing users to lose items when switching between platforms.
change_requests.business_justification: Critical user experience issue affecting customer retention. Currently impacting 12% of mobile users.

symptoms: cart items disappear when switching platforms
duplicate items appear in some cases
cart totals don't match between platforms
bug_details.root_cause: race condition in cart sync API

acceptance_criteria: Cart contents remain consistent across all platforms
Real-time synchronization when user switches platforms
No duplicate or missing items
Cart totals match across platforms
Works for both logged-in and guest users
